discover_products: Discover unique products and enjoy convenient shopping with worldwide delivery.
fast_delivery_desc: We deliver orders worldwide in the shortest possible time.
secure_payment_desc: Your payment data is reliably protected.
support_247_desc: Always ready to help with any question.
dev_warning: This product is under development and uses a free server (which sleeps)
wake_server: Click the link to wake up the server
login_subtitle: Login form with email and password
shop_subtitle: We create the best shopping experience
brand_history: The story of a brand that started with a dream to make online shopping easier, more enjoyable and more accessible for everyone.
story_text: Meloni was born in 2020 from a simple idea: to make online shopping as enjoyable as a walk through your favorite boutique. We noticed that many platforms forget about the human touch, turning shopping into a soulless process.
stats_text: We are proud that 80% of our customers come back again, and many become our friends.
values_subtitle: Four principles that make Meloni special
quality_desc: We carefully select every product so you get only the best.
trust_desc: Transparency at every stage — from order to delivery.
innovation_desc: Constantly implementing new technologies for your convenience.
care_desc: We value every customer and are always ready to help.
team_desc: Behind every successful order are talented people who make Meloni special
contact_desc: We are always happy to help and answer your questions
founder_desc: Over 10 years in e-commerce, creating unique shopping experiences
art_director_desc: Responsible for visual style and brand user experience
